title: Enable a real weekly team status workflow across Teams, SharePoint, Outlook, and Power Automate
execution_plan_ref: Operations/EXECUTION_PLAN.md § Initiative: M365 Team Status Workflow Enablement
objective: Make the direct repo runtime able to provision a recurring team meeting, shared progress tracker, Friday reminder automation, and weekly digest automation through the M365-only stack.

decision_rule.weekly_status_workflow_ready: EnvironmentAccessible AND TrackerProvisioning AND FlowProvisioning AND ScenarioValidation
decision_rule.scenario_validation: RecurringMeetingCreated AND TrackerCreated AND ReminderFlowLive AND DigestFlowLive

in_scope: live reference workflow provisioning and validation

requirements.description: Create the governed package, prompt pair, and tracker activation.
Repair Power Platform environment accessibility for the runtime identity.
Add the missing repo provisioning surfaces for tracker and workflow setup.
Freeze the deterministic workflow contract and template inputs.
Validate the workflow end-to-end through the repo.

focused_tests: focused pytest for any new tracker/workflow surfaces

execution_status.next_act: execute R1 tenant environment accessibility repair
